name: LaunchKit
description: JSON to Landing Page generator — create beautiful product pages from config

endpoints.name: create_page
endpoints.description: Create or update a landing page from JSON config (upsert by slug)

config.description: Page configuration with sections: hero, features, pricing, og, theme, footer

endpoints.name: list_pages
endpoints.description: List all landing pages (metadata only, no config blob)

endpoints.name: delete_page
endpoints.description: Delete a landing page by slug
